description: BreedOS curated public wheat genotype datasets. Files in this directory (except .gitignore, README.md, MANIFEST.json) are gitignored. Fetch with the commands in README.md.

datasets.name: Durum wheat 259 accessions × 7817 SNPs
datasets.content: PLINK-cleaned VCF; 14 chromosomes; GT field only; no missing-genotype annotation in header. Suitable as a quick wheat fixture for testing the BreedOS loader end-to-end.

datasets.name: 55K SNP × 159 wheat samples (Dryad)
datasets.format: Excel binary (.xlsb) — requires conversion to VCF/CSV
datasets.manual_reason: Dryad blocks programmatic downloads from this sandbox (HTTP 403). Operator visits the landing URL in a browser, downloads the .xlsb, and saves it into this folder before redeploy.
datasets.content: Original SNP genotype data for 159 wheat samples. Includes SNP IDs, chromosomes, positions, alleles, and per-sample genotypes. Currently stored as Excel binary; will need a conversion script (xlsb → VCF/CSV) before the BreedOS loader can use it.

datasets.name: Pakistani historical wheat panel — 37K SNPs (Dryad)
datasets.manual_reason: Dryad blocks programmatic downloads from this sandbox (HTTP 403). Operator visits the landing URL in a browser, downloads the .xlsx file set, and saves them into this folder before redeploy.
datasets.content: Pakistani historical wheat panel: metadata, pedigree, consolidated genotype data, and annotations. 5 files total ~28.75 MB. The largest file (consolidated 37K genotypes) requires xlsx → VCF conversion before use.

datasets.name: INRAE 1000 wheat exomes (IWGSC RefSeq v1.0)
datasets.format: ZIP containing VCF files (RefSeq v1.0 coordinates)
datasets.content: Canonical 1000 wheat exome project: 2.8M SNPs across 890 wheat accessions, exome-captured, positioned on IWGSC Chinese Spring RefSeq v1.0. Standard reference dataset cited in many publications.

datasets.name: Wheat 2.8M SNPs lifted to RefSeq v2.1 (Zenodo)
datasets.content: Same 1000 wheat exome SNPs as the INRAE dataset, but lifted to the newer RefSeq v2.1 assembly via LiftOff (Vasudevan & Cloutier, BMC Research Notes 2023). Larger because it's a single uncompressed VCF rather than a chromosome-split ZIP.

datasets.name: Watkins Worldwide Wheat G2B — 827 landraces + 208 cultivars
datasets.format: Per-chromosome VCF.gz files (manual download from portal)
datasets.content: Watkins landrace collection (827) + 208 modern cultivars, WGS-derived variant calls split by chromosome. The portal does not expose stable direct-download URLs that work programmatically; operator visits the portal manually and saves chromosome VCFs into this datasets/ folder.
